final_plan:
#Task1: List the assets at the MAIN facility.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: List of assets at the MAIN facility.

#Task2: Verify the list of assets obtained from the IoT Data Download agent.
#Agent2: IoT Data Download
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Confirmation or correction of the asset list at the MAIN facility.

#Task3: Analyze the asset list to ensure it includes the required assets.
#Agent3: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Relevant failure modes or sensor data for the assets.

#Task4: Generate a work order for any identified issues with the assets.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Work order for identified issues.
